name: Windows 95
description: The iconic Windows 95 operating system aesthetic. Gray windows, navy title bars, teal desktop, and 3D beveled borders. Instantly recognizable nostalgia from the dawn of consumer computing.
source: Microsoft Windows 95 UI, Chicago design language, classic Win32 controls

typography.fontSans: 'Pixelify Sans', 'MS Sans Serif', 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, sans-serif

demo.title: Windows 95
demo.subtitle: Where do you want to go today?

suggestions.icons: System icons as emoji/unicode — folders, documents, computer, trash
suggestions.components: 3D beveled buttons, sunken text inputs, tabbed dialogs, window title bars with controls, start menu, progress bars with chunky blocks
suggestions.avoid: border-radius, gradients (except title bar), soft shadows, rounded anything, modern flat design, blur effects
suggestions.texture: None — flat solid colors with 3D border illusions only
